CREATE TABLE test_array (data ARRAY<INTEGER>);
INSERT INTO test_array (data) VALUES (vector(1, 2, 3, 4, 5));
SELECT aref(data, 0) FROM test_array;
SELECT aref(data, 4) FROM test_array;
INSERT INTO test_array (data) VALUES (vector('A', 'B', 'C', 'D', 'E'));
SELECT aref(data, 2) FROM test_array;
SELECT aref(data, 1) FROM test_array WHERE aref(data, 1) = 'B';
CREATE TABLE test_string (str STRING);
INSERT INTO test_string (str) VALUES ('Hello World');
SELECT aref(str, 0) FROM test_string;
SELECT aref(str, 10) FROM test_string;
SELECT aref(str, 5) FROM test_string WHERE aref(str, 5) = ' ';
SELECT aref(str, -1) FROM test_string;
CREATE TABLE test_combined (id INTEGER, data ARRAY<STRING>);
INSERT INTO test_combined (id, data) VALUES (1, vector('first', 'second', 'third'));
SELECT aref(data, 0) FROM test_combined WHERE id = 1;
SELECT aref(data, 2) FROM test_combined WHERE id = 1;
SELECT aref(data, 1) AS second_value FROM test_combined WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE test_nested (id INTEGER, data ARRAY<ARRAY<STRING>>);
INSERT INTO test_nested (id, data) VALUES (1, vector(vector('a', 'b'), vector('c', 'd')));
SELECT aref(aref(data, 0), 1) FROM test_nested WHERE id = 1;
SELECT aref(aref(data, 1), 0) FROM test_nested WHERE id = 1;
SELECT aref(data, 0) AS first_element FROM test_nested WHERE id = 1;
SELECT aref(data, 1) AS second_element FROM test_nested WHERE id = 1;
